texto: He glanced nervously over his shoulder with a remarkable pair of codfish eyes.'Like a ’orrid movie I saw once in Canarsie. Bunch o’ lunks set off on a cruise to nowhere, just like this, and wot do you suppose they all was?''What?''Dead.''How?''Dead as mutton, only they didn’t know it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rufus King: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “He glanced nervously over his shoulder with a remarkable pair of codfish eyes.'Like a ’orrid movi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, dead, death pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e death.

texto: Just as love makes you blind so does wealth, and of the two blindnesses wealth is the worse because of the incalculable harm it is able to do to people other than yourself.
explicacao: Citação de Rufus King sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Just as love makes you blind so does wealth, and of the two blindnesses wealth is the worse becau…” articula negocios, money, wealth em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como wealth.
